title: New York Moves to Align Stablecoin Rules With GENIUS Act
message_html: New York Moves to Align Stablecoin Rules With GENIUS Act ...
snippet: The New York State Department of Financial Services (DFS) announced a proposed regulation that would harmonize its stablecoin framework with new federal regulations. title: MiCA architect says EU should prioritize tokenization over DeFi rules
message_html: MiCA architect says EU should prioritize tokenization over DeFi rules ...
snippet: One of MiCA's architects said he sees no need to regulate DeFi as the European Commission gathers feedback on the framework's future.
